name: Vessel Compass
summary: The Vessel Compass is a compact, high-performance 510 battery designed to cartridge-based vaping.
description: The Vessel Compass is a compact, high-performance 510 battery designed to cartridge-based vaping. Despite its small footprint, the Compass delivers exceptional power and reliability for everyday use. No — Vessel does not recommend using the Compass during charging. The three LED indicators will show when the battery needs a recharge. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
